reviews.review_description:
Lord have mercy this game is absolutely fun!!! The tasks you have to do to advance to the next room require your logic and creativity!!  Then somewhere along the line you commandeer a robotic dog that acts like a key for  certain locations,  a detractor for some of the robots,  and a dead weight for pressure plates on the ground to open doors!! Thank you to the makers of this game!! Well worth the money I paid for it!!

My only question to Oculus is why this game hasn't been ported over to the Oculus Go Library?

New UPDATE: I purchased this game for gear vr and absolutely loved it please make it compatible with Oculus Quest 2 as I have the new headset 


Im the type of person who likes hidden object or detective games where you try to find things or figure them out and this was an Awesome game we need more like it!!! we need a part 2
why cant i download this on my note 5? "unsupported device or os"? wtf?

Decent but my character randomly stops running after about 4 seconds of controller touchpad input and I have to lift my finger and touch it again.  I dont seem to have this problem in other games. Has got me killed a bunch.

Also the centering of the controller seems to be worse in the game and it actually messed up my controller sync and I had to manually unpair/unlist from BT and re-pair before it would work again. Again, no other controller games seem to have these issues.

developer_response.body: Hi Anthonsh, sorry to hear you're experiencing trouble with the controller. Our first guess would be, it's the controller's firmware version. In the bluetooth menu tap on the paired controller under Settings --> Controllers. It will show when a new firmware version is available. However, if the issue persists, contact us via info@forcefieldvr.com and we can further investigate the issue. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I fully expected this to be in first person view. It isn't. The game plays just like any other basic pc game and a bland one at that. Why is this even a vr game? At least having it be in first person would have elevated the experience to something more interesting.
This is a real video game with an actual story.

In this game you watch your character as if from a security camera. If you've played Herobound then it's kind of like that. The camera is stationary for each screen. The object is to sneak around a facility without getting caught. To do this you hide in lockers or follow along behind moving crates that block you from view of the drones. Really well made, looks great, lots of fun so far.
Graphics is stunning with details. Gameplay is very fun and addictive. Level design is challenging. Love it. Recommended!

reviews.review_title: Pretty cool game, but performance issues
reviews.review_description: It's a pretty fun and polished game. Sadlh this is also the first game that ever gave me an overheating warning about 30 mins in. I'm using an exynos S7 and never had this problem before. I've completely drained my battery plenty of times in all sorts of games but it never overheated. Other than that, it's a pretty good game. Would be great if the was a way to toggle in and out of first person though.

developer_response.body: Hi Xath, we're sorry to hear you're experiencing overheating problems. In our QA tests this wasn't the issue on the exynos S7 chipset. If you can get in touch with us via info@forcefieldvr.com we can run additional tests to locate and resolve the issue.  Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
Pros:
 - Great graphics & sound
 - Good duration
 - Good gameplay
 
Cons:
 - A bit too easy
 - Very simple story (almost exclusively to serve gameplay)
 - Gameplay could have more variation

This game is worth the money. It is beautiful and entertaining. Not to short and makes you think.  One of the best games on vr that I have purchased.  I.hope they will make more games and expand this one.  I will be a buyer!!

reviews.review_title: A fine way to start playing VR
reviews.review_description: This is my first VR GAME and it's a great way to get into it. Ya, my eyes hurt...But im too addicted to stop! 3 levels down 9 to go.
